svg.text: Multi-agent RAG poisoning experiment · 3 models · 480 rounds · March 2026

g.text: Reset RAG → inject payload → run target
→ score. One clean cycle per round.

TARGET SYSTEM — UNHACKABLE ENTERPRISES AI ASSISTANT

g.text: orchestrator.py · sliding window context · max 10 iterations
This is where poison is consumed.
worker.py · sliding window context · max 10 iterations
EXAMPLE: SUCCESSFUL ATTACK (SUBSTITUTIVE FRAMING, GPT-4O) — 40% COMPROMISE RATE
COMPROMISED — PII sent to unauthorized domain
EXAMPLE: RESISTED ATTACK (INSTRUCTIVE FRAMING, GPT-3.5-TURBO) — 10% COMPROMISE RATE
SAFE — model followed user's original instruction over RAG
Instructive framing: only 10% compromise on gpt-3.5-turbo
